modules.name: rayvision_houdini.tests.test_analyze_houdini
documentation:
The plugin of the pytest.

The pytest plugin hooks do not need to be imported into any test code, it will
load automatically when running pytest.

References:
    https://docs.pytest.org/en/2.7.3/plugins.html
-*- coding=utf-8 -*-

modules.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini
documentation: A interface for maya.
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-

classes.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.__init__
documentation:
Initialize and examine the analysis information.

Args:
    cg_file (str): Scene file path.
    software_version (str): Software version.
    project_name (str): The project name.
    plugin_config (dict): Plugin information.
    render_software (str): Software name, Houdini by default.
    local_os (str): System name, linux or windows.
    workspace (str): Analysis out of the result file storage path.
    custom_exe_path (str): Customize the exe path for the analysis.
    platform (str): Platform no.
    custom_db_path (str): Custom database file location path.
    logger (object, optional): Custom log object.
    log_folder (str, optional): Custom log save location.
    log_name (str, optional): Custom log file name.
    log_level (string):  Set log level, example: "DEBUG","INFO",
      "WARNING","ERROR".

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.check_path
documentation: Check if the path exists.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.check_cg_name
documentation:
Check if the scene file name has Chinese.

Raises:
    FileNameContainsChineseError: Scene file name has Chinese.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.add_tip
documentation:
Add error message.

Args:
    code (str): error code.
    info (str or list): Error message description.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.save_tips
documentation: Write the error message to tips.json.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.check_local_os
documentation:
Check the system name.

Args:
    local_os (str): System name.

Returns:
    str

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.check_workspace
documentation:
Check the working environment.

Args:
    workspace (str):  Workspace path.

Returns:
    str: Workspace path.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini._get_all_houdini_ver
documentation:
Get all Houdini versions in the registry.

Returns (list): All Houdini versions.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini._match_env
documentation:
Get env string.

Args:
    env (str): Env name.
    string (str): Env val.

Returns (list): Env names.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini._get_file_save_ver
documentation: Get the version information in the scene file.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini._get_window_regedit
documentation: Get the information in the specified registry path.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini._get_install_path
documentation: Get the value of InstallPath of the specified registry.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.compare_the_version
documentation: Get the program path of Houdini.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.find_location
documentation:
Get the path where the local Houdini startup file is located.

Raises:
    CGExeNotExistError: The path to the startup file does not exist.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.analyse_cg_file
documentation:
Analyse cg file.

Analyze the scene file to get the path to the startup file of
  the CG software.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.write_task_json
documentation: Initialize task.json.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.check_result
documentation: Check that the analysis results file exists.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.get_file_md5
documentation: Generate the md5 values for the scenario.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.write_upload_json
documentation: Generate the upload.json.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.get_geo_node_dict
documentation: Get all render geo node

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.set_geo_node_order
documentation:
Set geo node dependency.

Args:
    geo_node_dict(dict): all render geo node dict.

methods.name: rayvision_houdini.analyze_houdini.AnalyzeHoudini.analyse
documentation:
Build a cmd command to perform an analysis.

Args:
    exe_path (string): custom rendering software absolute path.
    no_upload (bool): Do you not generate an upload,json file.

Raises:
    AnalyseFailError: Analysis scenario failed.
Houdini analyse.
